# build-a-bookmark-manager-app-not-an-image-processor-the-app-stores-website-bookmarks-with-title-url
> Generated by **VIA**

## Task
Build a bookmark manager app. NOT an image processor. The app stores website bookmarks with title, URL, category, and notes fields. React frontend shows bookmark cards grouped by category. Users can add a new bookmark via a form and delete existing ones. FastAPI backend with endpoints: POST /bookmarks, GET /bookmarks, DELETE /bookmarks/{id}, GET /bookmarks?category=work. Include API docs.

## Frontend
GitHub Pages
